description_long: This is a BMX-style bicycle with a compact, sturdy frame and thick, knobby tires designed for urban riding and tricks. The frame is primarily metallic silver, featuring a straight top tube and a slightly sloped down tube, with a brown standard saddle seat mounted on a short seat post. The handlebars are wide and rise upward, providing leverage for stunts and control, and are finished in black. The pedals are flat and robust, suitable for quick mounting and dismounting, and the wheels have black rims with multiple spokes for strength. The bicycle lacks any visible fenders, racks, or baskets, emphasizing its minimalist, performance-oriented design.
description: A silver BMX bicycle with thick black tires, wide riser handlebars, and a brown standard saddle seat, built for urban riding and tricks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide black handlebars, single front wheel, and the narrow profile of the frame.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full frame geometry, brown saddle, and both wheels with visible spokes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the brown saddle, rear wheel, and the alignment of the frame and pedals.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the frame structure, crankset, and both wheels, mirroring the left side.
